title: bidens hassleriana
intro: Bidens hassleriana, also known as the South American beggarticks, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bidens hassleriana include its ability to relieve gastrointestinal issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments.
